blockers_encountered.resolution: Inspected the generated site HTML for the real ids (discover-pin-verify, old-new-alias-map-052), corrected both links, re-ran --strict — anchor messages gone, exit 0.

blockers_encountered.resolution: Not in scope — no version string changed. Gate for this docs pack is mkdocs --strict, which is clean. Flagged for the orchestrator.
